title: Sentiment Battered By Uncertain Economic Backdrop
section_path: Sentiment Battered By Uncertain Economic Backdrop
section_path_text: Sentiment Battered By Uncertain Economic Backdrop
summary:
Main
A broader risk-off tone across markets weighed on sentiment, and was exacerbated by disappointing economic growth in China. By Daniel Hynes

Market Commentary
Copper recorded its biggest weekly loss in two years after the market was disappointed by a lack of new policy measures in China. The Third Plenum brought together China's leaders to map out the general direction of the country's long-term social and economic policies.
